sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34993" key="e)na/rqmios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνάρθμιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n34993.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having an affinity with</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">οἴνῳ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:91" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">91</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (prob.).</sense> </entryFree>
